title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's hiring platform Paraform rejected the industry trend of replacing human recruiters with AI, instead investing heavily in human recruitment at scale. The company grew revenue 10x in 2025 by retaining humans as the core service while serving enterprise customers like Palantir and Rippling, arguing that AI has paradoxically made hiring noisier rather than faster.
